name: Labyrinth Heavy Tank
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>迷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>宮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>重</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>戦</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>車</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. Cannot attack the turn it is Normal Summoned. During your Main Phase: You can place 1 of your "Sanga of the Thunder", "Kazejin", or "Suijin" that is banished, or in your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, then, if you control a "Labyrinth Wall" card, you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Labyrinth Heavy Tank" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. Cannot attack the turn it is Normal Summoned. During your Main Phase: You can place 1 of your "Sanga of the Thunder", "Kazejin", or "Suijin" that is banished, or in your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, then, if you control a "Labyrinth Wall" card, you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Labyrinth Heavy Tank" once per turn.
eff: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. Cannot attack the turn it is Normal Summoned. During your Main Phase: You can place 1 of your "Sanga of the Thunder", "Kazejin", or "Suijin" that is banished, or in your hand or Deck, face-up in your Spell & Trap Zone as a Continuous Spell, then, if you control a "Labyrinth Wall" card, you can destroy 1 monster your opponent controls. You can only use this effect of "Labyrinth Heavy Tank" once per turn.

action: Places the player's banished cards in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from hand in Spell & Trap Zone
Places cards from Deck in Spell & Trap Zone
mst: Treats monsters as Continuous Spell Cards
attack: Cannot attack the turn it is Summoned
